gauge.name: Rio Grande De Manati near Manati

impacts.statement: PR-2 impassable from La Vuelta Nutrition Club to Paso Real.-erg 09/24
Flood water reaches houses in Sector California, near PR-2. -erg 09/2024
Widespread flooding at PR-2. The road becomes totally impassable.-erg 05/2025
Several lanes of PR-2 will become impassable. -erg 05/2025
Rio Grande de Manati likely to be overflowed over PR-2, km 51 to 52 from Barceloneta eastward to Manati/ erg 05/2025
